team.name: Dr. Adebayo Ogunleye
team.bio: Dr. Ogunleye has over 15 years of experience in computer science education and leads the Cyber School Experience program with a vision for collaborative digital learning.

team.name: Prof. Chioma Eze
team.bio: Prof. Eze is a seasoned educator specializing in curriculum development and academic excellence. She oversees all academic programs and ensures quality standards.

team.name: Engr. Michael Okonkwo
team.bio: Engr. Okonkwo is a network engineer with 8 years of industry experience. He leads the CN tutoring team and specializes in networking and cybersecurity.

team.name: Dr. Ngozi Adeyemi
team.bio: Dr. Adeyemi is an expert in communication systems and digital media. She leads the CM tutoring team and brings years of academic and research experience.

team.name: Mr. Tunde Balogun
team.bio: Mr. Balogun is a mathematics specialist with a passion for making complex concepts easy to understand. He leads the mathematics study group sessions.

team.name: Ms. Folake Ogunbiyi
team.bio: Ms. Ogunbiyi is dedicated to student welfare and engagement. She coordinates all student activities, events, and support services.

team.name: Mr. Chidi Nwachukwu
team.bio: Mr. Nwachukwu ensures the smooth operation of all technical platforms. He handles IT support, system maintenance, and technical troubleshooting.

team.name: Ms. Amara Okafor
team.bio: Ms. Okafor manages all learning resources and study materials. She curates, organizes, and updates the resource library for students.

team.name: Mr. Kunle Adeosun
team.bio: Mr. Adeosun manages the WhatsApp community and ensures active engagement across all groups. He facilitates communication and community building.
